name: Boris de Wit
headline: Making software, AI alignment
about: Most developers understand the technical stack. Most designers understand the human side. I work at both layers: orchestrating AI systems that actually ship, while obsessing over how people interact with software & AI agents.What that looks like in practice:Full-stack agentic development & content automationcontent and workshops around AI adoptionOrganizing hackathons that bring builders togetherAs AI agents are set to shake up the software game, I believe there's massive opportunity to move away from the attention economy into something better. Excited about agentic commerce and how agents will be used by consumers. I see everything I build as a chance to get the incentives right: systems that are safe, useful, and oriented toward human well-being.

name: Kevin Muiser
headline: Automating workflows, amplifying growth | Jouw processen doen het werk, jij doet wat écht telt | Let’s connect!
about:
What if your business could grow without constantly hiring new people?
What if your team had time to spare - instead of getting bogged down in repetitive tasks?

I help companies automate their processes with no-code tools.
Not with code. Not with 17 developers. Just smartly built systems that take work off your hands, can be implemented directly into your existing processes and create room to really grow.

My approach - Efficiency over complexity. System over symptom management.
AI to me is a tool, not the backbone. The hype is fun for on LinkedIn - I build solutions that make a difference on the shop floor.

Less manual work. More overview. Better results.
And all without an army of staff or expensive tech projects.

Your business doesn't have to work harder.
It needs to run smarter.

name: Thomas Termaat // DFK // AI Advertising Agency // AI AM
headline: De Franse Kamer | AI Taste
about: Een onvermoeibare creatieveling met energie voor tien. Thomas ziet nooit beren op zijn pad. Hij heeft een vooruitziende blik en maakt van elk probleem een mooie uitdaging. Alles wat met communicatie te maken heeft, lijkt Thomas zijn interesse te wekken. Met een graffiti achtergrond en een jarenlange ervaring in de reclamebranche is dat goed te begrijpen. Zijn liefde voor het golfsurfen moet vaak genoeg plaatsmaken voor deadlines en afspraken, maar klagen doet hij niet, wel staat de webcam altijd op zee gericht. Thomas is een echte autodidact en ondernemer. Zo stond hij aan de wieg van een aantal bedrijven, waaronder Promodukties en Boomerangcards.

name: Carolina Posma
headline: Founder Postiv AI - AI Agent for LinkedIn Content Creation | Turn your expertise into LinkedIn leads that drive revenue | For founders & B2B teams who want to attract quality prospects through quality content, not fluff
about:
You know you should post on LinkedIn to attract clients.

But between client calls, team meetings, and actually running the business? There's no time.

That's why I built Postiv AI: your LinkedIn AI agent that helps you create content to attract high-trust clients.

𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐰𝐞 𝐛𝐮𝐢𝐥𝐭:
Postiv AI turns your existing expertise into consistent LinkedIn posts and carousels. No blank page. No ghostwriter bills. Just your knowledge, your voice, amplified.

Upload your presentations, videos, or blog posts. Your AI agent learns your voice and creates authentic content (including carousels) that attracts clients (because just likes don't pay your bills).

𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐮𝐥𝐭𝐬:
"Having seen my first post go out today, it already generated 7 unique conversions and 2 meeting requests in the first few hours - wow! " - Mark Stephens

"I used to have a Custom GPT for my LinkedIn content creation, but Postiv AI is much better and saves me +60 minutes per LinkedIn post. Highly recommend!" - Nacho Pujol

DM me "POSTIV" if you want to see how it works or try it yourself via https://postiv.ai.

name: Thomas Huijsmans
headline: Whistleman Media // FNDR Studio // Because a good story deserves to be told
about:
Started my first business at 17. Today I help ambitious restaurants, bars, and cafés in Amsterdam tell their story through a social-first approach. Not just by creating content, but by thinking about how brands show up where people are actually looking.

Launching FNDR Studio in 2025, I simultaneously build practical AI tools for brands. From content systems and visibility tracking to scalable creative workflows that make it easier for brands to stay consistent and be found online without relying on guesswork. 

I thrive between brand thinking, visual storytelling, and system building. Always exploring better ways to create, scale, and make brands stand out for the right reasons.

name: Valentino Kemper
headline: Founder & CEO VETA-Media | AI Systems Architect & Creative Director | Scalable Intelligence for Brands, Leaders & Digital Culture
about:
With over a decade of experience at the intersection of digital culture, short-form media, and intelligent technology, I am the Founder & CEO of VETA-Media, a modern systems-driven company operating across AI automation, custom software, creator ecosystems, and cinematic storytelling.

Long before short-form became the dominant communication layer of the internet, I was already building inside the early Musical.ly ecosystem. While most businesses underestimated the platform, we developed communities, distribution systems, and brand structures years before Musical.ly evolved into TikTok in 2018. That early groundwork became the foundation for what VETA-Media represents today: infrastructure before hype.

Today, VETA partners with brands, founders, and organizations to design scalable digital systems that combine:

AI-driven automation

intelligent workflows

custom-built software

creator and media infrastructure

and high-impact storytelling

Not as isolated services, but as one integrated growth architecture.

Under VETA, we focus on building long-term digital leverage instead of short-term campaigns. Our work is centered around speed, clarity, and scalable execution in an always-on digital environment.

VETA is positioned as a long-term partner for companies that want to operate ahead of markets, not behind them.
